steps.title: Set up
steps.content: 1 leuga = 7,500 pedes. Multiply to convert 3.8 leugas: 3.8 × 7,500.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $28500$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $28500$ is the value to enter.
